body.docName: 获取法人公司列表信息
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/common/getLegalComInfoList 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/common/getLegalComInfoList 
 ## 接口描述 
结算单新增时，外部系统需要根据费控的法人公司查询到相应名称的编码信息，才能新增 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: GET  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"sensitive":true,"desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BAXFT00001%E7%9A%84%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001","maxLength":"8","label":"%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7"}}],"open":false}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点","required":false},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"sensitive":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%2Cfalse-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%09"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"sensitive":true,"maxLength":"256","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"data","sensitive":true,"required":true,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","maxLength":"1000","exampleValue":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depId","required":true,"sensitive":true,"label":"%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8ID","exampleValue":"0000","maxLength":"15"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depNam","required":true,"sensitive":true,"label":"%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B81","maxLength":"120"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"taxNum","label":"%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%A8%8E%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"012345678912345678","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depStatus","required":true,"sensitive":true,"label":"%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%09","desc":"%20%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%3A0%E5%81%9C%E7%94%A81%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8","exampleValue":"1","maxLength":"1"}}]}],"open":false}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 {BaseURL}/api/v1/common/getLegalComInfoList?OPAUID=XFT00001

### 返回示例

```
{
    "data": [
        {
            "depId": "0000",
            "depNam": "法人公司1",
            "taxNum": "012345678912345678",
            "depStatus": "1"
        },
        {
            "depId": "0007",
            "depNam": "法人公司2",
            "taxNum": "",
            "depStatus": "0"
        }
    ],
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```

```
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "接口调用失败，请检查公共参数（CSCPRJCOD）是否为空"
}
```



  
## 错误码说明 
无
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/common/getLegalComInfoList

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/common/getLegalComInfoList

接口描述

结算单新增时，外部系统需要根据费控的法人公司查询到相应名称的编码信息，才能新增

调用方式

METHOD: GET

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"sensitive":true,"desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BAXFT00001%E7%9A%84%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001","maxLength":"8","label":"%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7"}}],"open":false}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点","required":false},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"sensitive":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%2Cfalse-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%09"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"sensitive":true,"maxLength":"256","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"data","sensitive":true,"required":true,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","maxLength":"1000","exampleValue":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depId","required":true,"sensitive":true,"label":"%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8ID","exampleValue":"0000","maxLength":"15"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depNam","required":true,"sensitive":true,"label":"%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B81","maxLength":"120"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"taxNum","label":"%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%A8%8E%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"012345678912345678","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depStatus","required":true,"sensitive":true,"label":"%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%09","desc":"%20%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%3A0%E5%81%9C%E7%94%A81%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8","exampleValue":"1","maxLength":"1"}}]}],"open":false}]}

接口调用示例

{BaseURL}/api/v1/common/getLegalComInfoList?OPAUID=XFT00001

返回示例

{
    "data": [
        {
            "depId": "0000",
            "depNam": "法人公司1",
            "taxNum": "012345678912345678",
            "depStatus": "1"
        },
        {
            "depId": "0007",
            "depNam": "法人公司2",
            "taxNum": "",
            "depStatus": "0"
        }
    ],
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "接口调用失败，请检查公共参数（CSCPRJCOD）是否为空"
}

错误码说明

无
